Living in Newtleaf Hamlet, Zara Karam has built a reputable career at Frameward Construction after her formative years in Hearthbrook Cross. She is the author of the Coral Bridge Algorithm, an invention that has significantly influenced her industry. For her remarkable achievements, Zara was honored with the Echo Fern Ribbon, showcasing her talent and commitment to engineering and design.
